title: 3PCS Bicycle Tire Lever Tyre Spoon Changing Tool, Bike Tire Levers to Repair Bike Tube, Stainless Steel Bicycle Tire Lever Tyre Spoon Iron Changing Tool, Bike Tire Repair Changing Tools
features: Product Description: The Tool Is 12.5CM Long, and There Are 3 Pieces in Total, Which Is Enough for You to Use Bicycle Tire Lever to Replace Bicycle Tires at Home or in the Workshop.

High-Quality Material: The Steel Tyre Levers Is Made of High-Quality Steel, Which Is Hard and Durable, Not Easy to Deform and Rust. The Surface of the Bike Tyre Levers Is Smooth and Will Not Damage the Tire.
Easy to Use: Bike Tire Lever Helps You Pry off Tires Easily. Simply Insert the Chamfered Tip of the Cycle Tyre Levers Under the Bead and Spoke Hooks to Hold the Lever in Place.
Practical Design: The Metal Tyre Levers Are Comfortable to Hold and Ergonomically Designed. Molded Texture Helps You Hold the Tool During Use.

Application: The Tyre Levers for Bicycles Are a Must-Have Tool for Cyclists, Helping You Remove Bicycle Tires Easily. Bike Tyre Removal Tool Is a Must-Have for Furniture, but They’re Also Perfect for Working in the Workshop.
description: Features: Made of high-quality steel, hard and durable. Smooth surface, will not damage tires. Helps you easily pry and remove bicycle tires. Must-Have Tools for Cyclists. Specifications: Brand: HXMJIED
